sql_array: CREATE TABLE Pricing (item_id VARCHAR(255), price NUMERIC, description VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO Pricing VALUES ('item1', 10.0, 'Item 1'), ('item2', NULL, 'Item 2'), ('item3', INFINITY, 'Item 3'), ('item4', 5.1, 'Item 4'), ('item5', -3.5, 'Item 5');
SELECT item_id, price, isfinitenumeric(price) AS is_finite FROM Pricing WHERE price IS NOT NULL;
SELECT item_id, price, price || ' ' || description AS full_description, isfinitenumeric(price) AS is_finite FROM Pricing WHERE price IS NOT NULL;
SELECT item_id, isfinitenumeric(price) AS is_finite FROM Pricing WHERE price < 0 OR price > 10.0;
SELECT COUNT(item_id), AVG(price) FROM Pricing GROUP BY isfinitenumeric(price);
SELECT p1.item_id || ' ' || p2.description AS combined_info, isfinitenumeric(p1.price + p2.price) AS combined_finite FROM Pricing p1 JOIN Pricing p2 ON p1.price IS NOT NULL AND p2.price IS NOT NULL;
SELECT MAX(price) AS max_price, MIN(price) AS min_price, isfinitenumeric(MAX(price)) AS is_max_finite FROM Pricing;
SELECT item_id, price, isfinitenumeric(price + CAST('3.5' AS NUMERIC)) AS is_finite_casted FROM Pricing;
SELECT item_id, price, bif:isfinitenumeric(COALESCE(price, '0'::NUMERIC)) AS is_czero FROM Pricing WHERE price IS NOT NULL AND description != '';
